nl_query: What is the average number of active grants per faculty user?
failed_sql:
SELECT AVG(T2.is_available) AS average_active_grants
FROM user_auxiliary_role AS T1
JOIN app_user AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.id
WHERE T1.is_available = TRUE
